# isPaused

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the rendering loop is paused.

## Declaration

```swift
var isPaused: Bool { get set }
```

## Controlling Frame Updates

- **pauseOnWillResignActive**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the view controller automatically pauses the rendering loop when the application resigns the active state.
- **resumeOnDidBecomeActive**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the view controller automatically resumes the rendering loop when the application becomes active.
